1.title: EBS volume read OPS
1.query:
timeseries read = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ebs.ops.read, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ebs_volume }
| fieldsAdd ebs_volume_name = entityName(dt.entity.ebs_volume)
| sort arrayAvg(read) desc
| limit 10

2.title: EBS volume read throughput
2.query:
timeseries read = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ebs.throughput.read, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ebs_volume }
| fieldsAdd ebs_volume_name = entityName(dt.entity.ebs_volume)
| sort arrayAvg(read) desc
| limit 10

3.title: EBS volume read latency
3.query:
timeseries read = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ebs.latency.read, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ebs_volume }
| fieldsAdd ebs_volume_name = entityName(dt.entity.ebs_volume)
| sort arrayAvg(read) desc
| limit 10

5.title: EBS volume write OPS
5.query:
timeseries write = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ebs.ops.write, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ebs_volume }
| fieldsAdd ebs_volume_name = entityName(dt.entity.ebs_volume)
| sort arrayAvg(write) desc
| limit 10

6.title: EBS volume write throughput
6.query:
timeseries write = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ebs.throughput.write, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ebs_volume }
| fieldsAdd ebs_volume_name = entityName(dt.entity.ebs_volume)
| sort arrayAvg(write) desc
| limit 10

7.title: EBS volume write latency
7.query:
timeseries write = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ebs.latency.write, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ebs_volume }
| fieldsAdd ebs_volume_name = entityName(dt.entity.ebs_volume)
| sort arrayAvg(write) desc
| limit 10

8.title: EBS volume queue length
8.query:
timeseries queue = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ebs.queue, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ebs_volume }
| fieldsAdd ebs_volume_name = entityName(dt.entity.ebs_volume)
| sort arrayAvg(queue) desc
| limit 10

9.title: EBS volume idle time %
9.query:
timeseries idle_time = avg(dt.cloud.aws.ebs.idle_time, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.ebs_volume }
| fieldsAdd ebs_volume_name = entityName(dt.entity.ebs_volume)
| sort arrayAvg(idle_time) desc
| limit 10
